steps.title: Factor out the common factor
steps.content: Notice that the left side of the equation can be factored: $4x - 28 = 4(x - 7)$. Substitute this into the equation to get $4(x - 7) = -24$.

steps.title: Divide both sides by 4
steps.content: Divide both sides by 4: $$x - 7 = \frac{-24}{4} = -6$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
